bird.name: Long-billed honeyeater
bird.summary: The long-billed honeyeater (Melilestes megarhynchus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is monotypic within the genus Meli…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林-90e2a768
locations.name: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林
locations.summary: 湿性常绿阔叶林是一种WWF定义的栖地生境及以此为代表的生物群系，全称熱帶及亞熱帶的濕性闊葉林（英語：tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests），包含如下几种密切相关的生态系统： 热带…

relations.subject: Long-billed honeyeater
relations.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and offshore islands, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. Long-billed honeyeaters do not migrate. The average generation length of it is 5.8 years
